questions.question: In this question four statements are given that may differ from the commonly known facts. Each statement is followed by two conclusions. You have to give correct answer out of the five options given below: Statement: Some eggs are not hen. Some eggs are yolk. No egg is milk. Conclusion: (I) some yolk being hen is a possibility (II) No milk is yolk
options: If either conclusion I or II follows
If neither conclusion I nor II follows
questions.explanation: Option I follows since there is a possibility. Conclusion II do not follow since [some + no = some not] ![](https://u1.oliveboard.in/exams/solution/oliveimg/28153/image046.png)

questions.question: Choose the option that is unrelated (or odd one out amongst) the given set of words.
questions.explanation: All the words except 'tyro' refer to people who are already successful in their fields or have been there for a long time. 'Tyro' is a beginner or a novice.

questions.question: choose the option that is odd one out in the given options.
Four of the following five are alike in a particular pattern and hence form a group, Find the odd one which does not belong to that group.
questions.explanation: here we can observe the pattern, the pattern is .. for PQUM, P --- next alphabet( Q)... +3 = U...-7=M similarly, NOSK & RSWO follow the same pattern , but HIQE does not follow this pattern.

questions.question: In the following question, select the missing number from the given series. 2, 4, 16, 112, 448, ?
If N=14, NEST=29, then NAIL=?
questions.explanation: given N=14 now , for NEST ( N=14, E=5, S=19, T=20) if we take avg of there values, 14+5+19+20/4=29 hence, average of the position values is taken. Thus, NAIL = (14+1+9+12)/2= 36/2=18

questions.question: In the question, the word is represented by only one set of the numbers as given in any one of the alternatives. The set of numbers given in the alternatives are represented by two classes of alphabets as in two matrices given below. The columns and rows of Matrix 1 are numbered from 0 to 4 and columns and rows of matrix 2 are numbered from 5 to 9. A letter from this matrix can be represented first by its row and then by its column. Ex. A can be represented as 00, 75 and B can be represented as 24, 13, 57 etc. Similarly, you have to identify the set for the word "TEST". ![](https://u1.oliveboard.in/exams/solution/oliveimg/p3696/image008.png)
questions.explanation: T = 33/85 E = 02/41 S = 40/04 So, option 3 is the correct answer.

questions.question: G's rank from top of the class was 35th and from the bottom of the class was 14th. What will be K's rank from top of the class if his rank from bottom of the class is 23rd?
questions.explanation: Total number of students = rank from top + rank from the bottom -1 Total number of students= 35 + 14 -1 = 48 K's rank from bottom = total number of students - rank from the top +1 K's rank from bottom = 48-23+1 = 26th

questions.question: If 22 $ 2 * 4 = 5 and 64 $ 60 * 2 = 2, then in the expression 102 $ P * 3 = 29, what is the value of 'P'?
questions.explanation: The logic followed here is: Step I: 102 - P Step II: (102 - P)/3 = 29 102 - P = 29*3= 87 P = 102 - 87 = 15 P = 15

questions.question: In the following question, select the related number from the given alternatives. 894 : 144 ∷ 278 : ?
What will come in place of question (?) mark in the following series? XWA, VTC, SPF, OKJ, ?
questions.explanation: The first letter decreases by 2,3,4 and 5. The second letter decreases by 3,4,5 and 6. The third letter increases by 2,3,4 and 5. Hence the next word is JEO

questions.question: Find the missing number in the given matrix. 583369 61046106 713?176
questions.explanation: In every row, the third no. = square of first no. + second no. And the fourth no. = square of second no. + first no. 33=52 + 8, 69=82 + 5 46=62 + 10, 106=102 + 6 62=72 + 13, 176=132 + 7 Hence the missing number is 62

questions.question: From the given options, select the word which can't be formed using the letters of the given word. PERMUTATION
questions.explanation: The word "REMOVE" can't be formed as it contains a 'V' which is not present in PERMUTATION.

questions.question: In each of the following questions, select a figure from amongst the four alternatives, which would complete the pattern. ![](https://u1.oliveboard.in/exams/solution/sscimg/6031/image012.png)
questions.explanation: The figure should have two parallel horizontal and vertical lines each, passing through the centre and the diagonals of the square.

questions.question: Select the diagram that best represent the relationship among the items given in the question? Alto, Maruti, BMW A. ![](https://u1.oliveboard.in/exams/solution/rrbimg/84098/image007.png) B. ![](https://u1.oliveboard.in/exams/solution/rrbimg/84098/image008.png) C. ![](https://u1.oliveboard.in/exams/solution/rrbimg/84098/image009.png) D. ![](https://u1.oliveboard.in/exams/solution/rrbimg/84098/image010.jpg)

questions.question: Which number will come opposite to number 2 in the following dice? ![](https://u1.oliveboard.in/exams/solution/rrbimg/46401/image008.png)
questions.explanation: From the two images we can see that the numbers 1, 4, 5 and 6 appear adjacent to 2. Hence 3 appears opposite to 2.

questions.question: In a certain code CERTAIN is coded as XVIGZRM. How is MUNDANE coded in that language?
questions.explanation: A → Z, B → Y, C → X, ….., Z → A. ![](https://u1.oliveboard.in/exams/solution/obimg/9288/image001.jpg)

questions.question: A started from a point walked towards north for a distance of 10m then he took a right turn and walked for a distance of 5m and turned left walked for a distance of 3m and turned right walked for 6m then takes a 90° turn towards right and walked for a distance of 13m. Now A is in which direction with respect to starting point?
questions.explanation: ![](https://u1.oliveboard.in/exams/solution/oliveimg/p1138/image001.png) A is to the east of his starting point.

questions.question: Kennel : Dog : : Apiary : ?
questions.explanation: Kennel - A house of shelter for a dog Apiary - A place where bees are kept.

questions.question: Arrange the following words as per the order in dictionary. 1. Violence 2. Visibility 3. Vindicate 4. Visible 5. Virulent.
questions.explanation: This is the correct form as per the order in dictionary. Vindicate> Violence> Virulent> Visibility> Visible

questions.question: Select the related word/letters/numbers from the given alternatives: MPTV : PMWS :: KOSU : ?
questions.explanation: M + 3 = P, P - 3 = M, T + 3 = W, V - 3 = S. Similarly, K + 3 = N, O - 3 = L, S + 3 = V, U - 3 = R.

questions.question: Count the number of triangles in the given figure? ![](https://u1.oliveboard.in/exams/solution/oliveimg/p1848/image032.png)
questions.explanation: We first label the figure: ![](https://u1.oliveboard.in/exams/solution/oliveimg/p1848/image033.png) Now the triangle can be easily counted, they are ABD, BCD, ABC, DAC, AOB, AOD, DOC, COB, AOE, BOE, DOH, COH, KOL, MOL, KOM, NOP, QOP, NOQ, AKJ, BMF, DNI, CQG, BNG, AQI, DMJ, CKF.
